name: holysheep-cli
description: 🐑 One command to configure all AI coding tools — Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Aider & more

name: Lucid
description: An intelligence layer grounding autonomous agents in verified, real-time knowledge at scale.

name: agency-agents-zh
description: AI 智能体专家团队（中文版）— 80+ 个专业 AI 智能体人设，覆盖开发、设计、营销、测试、运维等领域，含小红书/抖音/微信等中国平台原创智能体

name: design-studio
description: A virtual design team for Claude Code — 9 specialist roles, 16 commands, 5 agents

name: SkyRoads-Codex
description: Reverse engineering a DOS game with no source code using Codex 5.4

name: PaperForge
description: End-to-end AI-powered academic paper writing system — from idea generation and literature search to experiment execution, result backfill, and LaTeX paper compilation. Supports multi-LLM routing, SSH remote training, incremental sync, and anti-AI-detection writing style.

name: airt
description: AIRT — A free, open-source AI Red Teaming course with 8 modules and hands-on Docker labs. Built with Perplexity Computer.

name: RusTorch
description: RusTorch is a production-grade deep learning framework re-imagined in Rust. It combines the usability you love from PyTorch with the performance, safety, and concurrency guarantees of Rust. Say goodbye to GIL locks, GC pauses, and runtime errors. Say hello to RusTorch.
